sentences.translationEn: Praise encourages a person to continue.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْمُعَلِّمُ لِلطَّالِبِ «عَمَلٌ رَائِعٌ يَا عَبْدَالرَّحْمَنِ».
sentences.translation: Učitelj je rekao studentu "odličan rad, Abdurrahmane".
sentences.translationEn: The teacher said to the student "wonderful work, Abdurrahman".

sentences.translation: Studentovo lice je pocrvenilo i osjetio se sretno.
sentences.translationEn: The student's face turned red and he felt happy.

sentences.arabic: فِي الدَّرْسِ التَّالِي حَاوَلَ أَكْثَرَ مِنَ الْمُعْتَادِ.
sentences.translation: Na sljedećem času trudio se više nego obično.
sentences.translationEn: In the next lesson he tried harder than usual.
